title: trischidium alternum
intro: Trischidium alternum, also known as Alterna tinctoria or golden alterner, is a flowering plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trischidium alternum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including wounds, infections, and skin conditions.
